Python Environment Setup Utilities for ustats

Source: R/setup.R
check_python_env.Rd

Helper functions for configuring and verifying the Python environment required by ustat().

Usage

check_python_env()

Value

Logical scalar

Details

These functions install and validate Python dependencies including u_stats, numpy, and torch (recommended for numerical stability and performance).

Author

Xingyu Chen Check Python and u_stats availability

Internal helper that checks whether Python and the required u_stats module are available.

On this page

Developed by Xingyu Chen, Ruiqi Zhang, Lin Liu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
